scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix client run typecheck && npm --prefix server run typecheck
scripts.pm2:stop: npm --prefix server exec pm2 -- stop pm2-dashboard
scripts.pm2:restart: npm --prefix server exec pm2 -- restart pm2-dashboard
scripts.pm2:logs: npm --prefix server exec pm2 -- logs pm2-dashboard
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run pm2:start
